findings.message: Target PR #9 changes only static app files and documentation for owner manual use of approved drafts.
evidence: GitHub changed-file list returned README.md, package.json, src/data/templates.js, src/lib/safety.js, src/lib/status.js, src/main.js, and src/styles.css.

findings.message: The app exposes the approved drafts through manual guide, copy buttons, owner checklist, platform checklist, weekly report view, and local export tools.
evidence: Manual posting guide and owner checklist added to source data.
Local JSON and text downloads are generated in the browser from static source data.

findings.message: Mandatory live-action blocks remain present after the manual posting pack update.
evidence: All platform accounts remain not_connected and draft_only.
livePostingBlocked remains true for AG OS automation.
No fetch, XMLHttpRequest, tracking, analytics, credential, scheduler, social connector, or n8n code was added.

findings.message: Safe target checks passed locally before merge.
evidence: Credential pattern scan found only blocked/safety text references.

optionalImprovements: Add browser-based interaction tests later if the target repo adopts a test runner.
Keep TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn handles pending until the owner provides exact public handles.
Keep OAuth, scheduling, posting, analytics, DMs/comments, and n8n activation as separate approval-gated milestones.
limitations: Critique is advisory only and cannot approve, merge, deploy, connect accounts, schedule, post, use credentials, call analytics APIs, activate automations, or create accepted lessons.
Playwright was not used because the target repo has no browser test runner.
Review did not alter target repository settings, sensitive values, live social accounts, production deployment, or domain/DNS.
